benefits.description: Sleeping better than in decades after starting CJC/IPA
Felt excited about life, described as being a totally different person within three days
Full of motivation and focus, no longer needed stimulant medication
Ran Tirz with goal of losing 15 pounds before spring

side_effects.description: GI adjustment period while on Tirz, described as 'new GI reality'

protocol_notes: User has ADD and takes methylphenidate daily. Got into peptides due to an injury and used the 'Wolverine stack'. Ran small doses of Tirz for one week before adding CJC/IPA. Held off on CJC/IPA while body adjusted to Tirz GI effects. Has not taken a stimulant since starting CJC/IPA.
